'''Gazurga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who worked for [[Sebolto]]. He was wanted dead by the infamous [[Podracing/Legends|podracer]] [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] for betting against him at the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]]. Sebulba considered him a traitor believing that Gazurga was bad luck to him. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] and his bounty collected by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].
